back_translation: This is the account of the line of Noah's sons—Shem, Ham, and Japheth. Sons were born to them after the flood.
The sons of Japheth were Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech, and Tiras.
The sons of Gomer were Ashkenaz, Riphath, and Togarmah.
The sons of Javan were Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim, and Dodanim.
From these, the maritime peoples separated into their territories, by their languages, by clans within their nations.
The sons of Ham were Cush, Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.
The sons of Cush were Seba, Havilah, Sabtah, Raamah, and Sabteca. The sons of Raamah were Sheba and Dedan.
Cush was the father of Nimrod, who began to be a mighty warrior on the earth.
He was a mighty hunter before the LORD; therefore it is said, "Like Nimrod, a mighty hunter before the LORD."
His kingdom began at Babylon, Erech, Accad, and Calneh, in the land of Shinar.
From that land he went forth to Assyria and built the city of Nineveh, the city of Rehoboth-Ir, and Calah,
and Resen, which is between Nineveh and Calah, which is the great city.
Mizraim was the ancestor of the Ludites, the Anamites, the Lehabites, the Naphtuhites,
the Pathrusites, the Casluhites (from whom the Philistines descended), and the Caphtorites.
Canaan was the father of Sidon his firstborn, and of Heth,
and of the Jebusites, the Amorites, and the Girgashites,
the Hivites, the Arkites, the Sinites,
the Arvadites, the Zemarites, and the Hamathites. Later the clans of the Canaanites were scattered.
The borders of the Canaanites extended from Sidon, toward Gerar, as far as Gaza, and toward Sodom, Gomorrah, Admah, and Zeboiim, as far as Lasha.
These are the descendants of Ham, by their clans, languages, lands, and nations.
Sons were also born to Shem, the older brother of Japheth. Shem was the ancestor of all the descendants of Eber.
The sons of Shem were Elam, Asshur, Arphaxad, Lud, and Aram.
The sons of Aram were Uz, Hul, Gether, and Mash.
Arphaxad was the father of Shelah, and Shelah was the father of Eber.
Eber had two sons. One was named Peleg, because in his days the earth was divided. His brother was named Joktan.
Joktan was the father of Almodad, Sheleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah,
Hadoram, Uzal, Diklah,
Obal, Abimael, Sheba,
Ophir, Havilah, and Jobab. All these were the sons of Joktan.
Their territory extended from Mesha to Sephar, in the eastern hill country.
These are the descendants of Shem, by their clans, languages, lands, and nations.
These are the clans of Noah's sons, by their generations and nations. From these the nations on the earth spread out after the flood.
